name: Add a Page, Section and Elements
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Your storefront is often the first interaction customers have with your brand. Adding visual sections like a "},{"text":"homepage banner","bold":true},{"text":", informative pages like an "},{"text":"About page","bold":true},{"text":", or functional sections like a "},{"text":"Contact form","bold":true},{"text":" helps you communicate clearly, build trust, and guide customers toward action."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Commerce Cloud’s theme builder makes this easy by letting you add and manage these sections visually—without writing any code."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Before You Begin"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Before you can design custom sections like a homepage banner, About page, or Contact form in the Theme Builder, you must first "},{"text":"create the page in Commerce Cloud","bold":true},{"text":". "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Step 1: Create a New Page"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"From the Commerce Cloud left navigation, go to "},{"text":"Sales Channels > Your Store > Use simple, readable text such as "},{"text":"about-us","code":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"contact-us","code":true},{"text":"."}]}]}]}],"id":"table-0-10","colSizes":[200,200,200]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Step 2 — Design the Page in the Theme Builder"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once you have created a page, you can move move to adding visual elements and designing how your page will look on the store front. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once the page exists, you design how it looks using your theme.. This is where you visually control how your content appears on the storefront. "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"1. Open Themes for the same Sales Channel"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Go to "},{"text":"Themes","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Locate the theme you want to work on (Choose Active theme to use current Store design)"}]}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"2. At the top of the builder, you’ll see a "},{"text":"page selector dropdown","bold":true},{"text":". This control is important because it determines "},{"text":"which page you are currently editing","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Each page on your website has its own layout, content, and purpose. The page selector helps you switch between these pages so you can customize them individually without affecting others."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Common pages include:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Home","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"About","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Contact","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Collection pages","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Product pages","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Blog pages","bold":true}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Best practice:","bold":true},{"text":" Always make sure to the correct page "},{"text":"before","bold":true},{"text":" you add sections or edit content. Otherwise, you might build on the wrong page."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Page Structure and Content Hierarchy"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Before you start designing, it helps to understand "},{"text":"how content is structured inside the Theme Builder","bold":true},{"text":". Pages in Commerce Cloud follow a clear, layered hierarchy that keeps layouts flexible, consistent, and easy to manage."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Every page is built in this order:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Page → Sections → Elements (Blocks)","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"1️⃣ Page – The Canvas"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A "},{"text":"page","bold":true},{"text":" is the overall container for your content.\nExamples include:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Home"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"About Us"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Contact Us"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Product page"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Collection page"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When you select a page from the dropdown at the top of the Theme Builder, you are choosing "},{"text":"which canvas you are working on","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Pages do not contain design by themselves — they hold sections."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/15078fbb-5a24-43e0-a95d-5fabdbf78b61/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-5923209251&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Xx5J6Ms3VTfg2XHKU7Gl7peUIRisXUvObQV8oXU6Cio&width=760","embedData":{"url":"https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/15078fbb-5a24-43e0-a95d-5fabdbf78b61/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-5923209251&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Xx5J6Ms3VTfg2XHKU7Gl7peUIRisXUvObQV8oXU6Cio&width=760","name":"","embedType":"image","float":"none","fileid":"15078fbb-5a24-43e0-a95d-5fabdbf78b61","filecollection":"contentId-5923209251","resizemode":"stretchy-fit","source":"ssr-server","ssrPlaceholderIgnored":""}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"2️⃣ Sections – The Layout Building Blocks"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A "},{"text":"section","bold":true},{"text":" defines a major layout area on a page.\nThink of sections as "},{"text":"rows or content zones","bold":true},{"text":" stacked vertically from top to bottom."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Examples of sections:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Image Banner"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Text + Image"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Featured Collection"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Contact Form"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Multi-column layout"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Key points about sections:","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"A page can have "},{"text":"multiple sections","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Sections are added "},{"text":"top to bottom, ","bold":true},{"text":"drag the section to move up/down in sequence."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Each section controls layout-level settings, such as:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Width and height"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Background color or image"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Spacing and alignment"}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You must "},{"text":"add a section before you can add or edit Elements (Blocks) – The Content Inside Sections"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Elements","bold":true},{"text":", also called "},{"text":"blocks","bold":true},{"text":", live "},{"text":"inside","italic":true},{"text":" sections.\nThey hold the actual content your customers see and interact with."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Common elements include:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Headings"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Paragraph text"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Images"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Buttons"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Forms"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Product or collection references"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"How elements work:","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Elements cannot exist on their own — they must belong to a section"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Each element has its own settings (text, links, fonts, colors)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Editing an element updates only that specific piece of "},{"text":"About","bold":true},{"text":" from the page dropdown"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click "},{"text":"Add preview","bold":true},{"text":" so you can see how it will look on the page"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Review the structure (number of columns, image placement, highlights"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once you find a layout that fits your content:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click the layout to "},{"text":"insert it into the page","bold":true}]}]}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"\nStep 4: What Gets Added to the Page"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"After inserting a section:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The section appears in the "},{"text":"Layers panel","bold":true},{"text":" on the left"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"It becomes part of the page structure"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Inside the section, you’ll see "},{"text":"elements","bold":true},{"text":" such as:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Headings"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Paragraphs"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Info cards"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Buttons or images (depending on layout)"}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"At this stage, you
